docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, IGNACIO AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, MARVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S SON IGNACIA MARTINEZ, JR. INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, IGNACIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, MARVIN $470.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED DEC-15-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, MARVIN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
